accepted_defects.root_cause: A byte-identical predecessor control intentionally reused by Build 0054 was incorrectly declared CREATE without approved_predecessor_overlap.
accepted_defects.corrective_action: Declare the reused path as UPDATE with explicit approved predecessor overlap and add a predecessor-aware executable regression fixture.

accepted_defects.root_cause: The staged-ownership gate incorrectly required every owned path to appear in the staged diff, while the approved predecessor UPDATE was byte-identical and therefore produced no Git change. The synthetic predecessor fixture used placeholder bytes and did not reproduce the canonical no-op condition.
accepted_defects.corrective_action: Preserve the exact predecessor bytes in the regression fixture; distinguish manifest ownership from the actual Git change-set; allow no-op paths only for explicit approved predecessor UPDATE entries; require the staged set to equal the actual Git change-set and reject all changes outside ownership.

accepted_defects.root_cause: Under Windows PowerShell StrictMode, direct access to approved_predecessor_overlap failed on manifest entries where that optional property was absent.
accepted_defects.corrective_action: Resolve optional manifest properties through PSObject.Properties before reading values, add an executable mixed-entry StrictMode probe, and prohibit direct optional-property dereference in both temporary and canonical staging gates.

inherited_controls: GitHub Actions run ID closure evidence
